coverLetterTemplate:
Hi {hiringTeam},

I'm excited to apply for the {title} role at {company}. With extensive experience in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend development, I'm confident I can contribute meaningfully to your team.

I've spent the last several years building high-quality web and mobile products, working with teams across gaming, fintech, and SaaS. I care about clean architecture, reliable delivery, and the kind of detail that makes a product feel solid in real use.

I'd love to chat about how I can help {company} build something great.

Best regards,
Arturas Miceika
